note: kaifuu-rpgmaker byte-surgically patches the www/data JSON text literals and emits a .kaifuu delta that kaifuu-delta apply reproduces byte-for-byte. Demonstrated here on a synthetic (non-retail) www tree and, out-of-band, on the real LustMemory corpus (test/rpgmaker-patch-apply-real-bytes.test.ts). Not exposed through the kaifuu EngineAdapter registry, so this is validation-artifact (readiness_only) evidence, not a positive-adapter claim.
